features: LUXURY FRAGRANCE FOR WOMEN - Since 1975, Milton-Lloyd have earned an unshakeable reputation for luxury womens perfumes without the expense. This distinctive womens perfume gift set is the perfect treat for the sophisticated female

4 PERFECTLY BALANCED LADIES PERFUMES - No2 is elegant and crisp, while No4 is sparkling, feminine and sensual. No6 is sensuous, warm and modern, while No8 is confident, fiery and rich – perfect for those who dare to stand out

LONG LASTING PERFUMES FOR WOMEN – Milton Lloyd Essentials comes with a minimum 6-hour guarantee. Its luxury oils, blended at high concentrations, promise outstanding quality and long-lasting performance in this gorgeous womans perfume gift set
THE MILTON-LLOYD ESSENTIALS COLLECTION – A trending collection of luxury womens fragrances by Milton-Lloyd, ideal for every occasion from day to night
MILTON-LLOYD LUXURY FRAGRANCES – Milton-Lloyd works with top perfumers, using the finest oils blended at high concentrations to create long-lasting luxury men's and women's perfumes
description: Product Description Discover a world of luxurious fragrance with the Essentials Quad Pack for Her 50ml – an exquisite gift set featuring four distinctive perfumes designed to suit every mood and occasion. This carefully curated collection from Milton-Lloyd blends elegance, sensuality, and modern sophistication, showcasing the expertise of top perfumers and the finest oils, blended at high concentrations for long-lasting performance. No2 is distinctive, elegant, and crisp. Fresh bergamot, peony and freesia lead into a warming heart of red fruits, violets, jasmine, and carnation. The rich, woody chypre base of orris, sandalwood, and vetiver leaves a refined trail that lingers beautifully. No4 is sparkling, feminine, and sensual. A burst of citrus, blackcurrant, and orange flower opens to a heart of elegant white florals, black pepper, and coffee. The composition is deepened by cedarwood, patchouli, and smooth vanilla. No6 is sensuous, warm, and modern. Bright bergamot, muguet, and water fruits unfold into a luxurious heart of jasmine, velvety red rose, and vetivert, resting on a comforting base of amber, patchouli, and vanilla. No8 is confident, fiery, and rich. Sparkling citrus, water jasmine, and green mandarin are lifted by ginger lily and salted vanilla, before settling into creamy sandalwood, rich cashmere, and ambergris. With notes of citrus, bergamot, blackcurrant, jasmine, orange blossom, salted vanilla, sandalwood, and musk throughout, this set offers a captivating olfactory journey. Beautifully presented, it’s the perfect gift for her or a luxurious treat for yourself. So, if you're looking for female perfume, a ladies perfume gift set, woman's perfume, women perfume or parfum women love to wear, perfume women feel great wearing, woman perfumes, floral perfumes for women, summer perfumes, edp perfume for women, perfume gift sets women love, perfume for women gift sets, perfume sets for women or women perfume gift sets, look no further than Milton Lloyd. Directions Apply to pulse points, such as wrist, neck and behind ears.
